titleStmt.title: SII 22.353: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 353. (A.R. No. 353 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, KUḌUMIYĀMALAI. ŚIKHĀNĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. VĪRA-PĀṆḌYADĒVA—13th YEAR.

summary.p: This is connected with No. 352 above, and registers the endorsement (kīḻpuṉaitīṭṭu) of the sale of the land and acknowledgement of the receipt of the amount from the purchaser Nāchchīyār by the nāṭṭār of Kōṉāḍu and the temple authorities of Tirunalakkuṉṟam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī virapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3Āvatu Uṭaiyār tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyanār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar Aruḷāl koṉāṭāṉa kaṭala
ṭaiyātilaṅkaikoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu nāṭṭomum Ikkoyiṟ tevar kaṉmi koyiṟkaṇakkaromum Ivvaṉaivom Ivvūrt tevaraṭiyāril tukkai yāṇṭār makaḷ nācci
yāṟkkuk kaiyiṭu kuṭutta paricāvatu nāṅkaḷ caṇṭeśvarap peruvilaiyāka viṟṟa Iluppaikkuṭi vayalil piramāṇappaṭi kācu 7 10 3[3 100] Ikkācu Eḻupattu muvā(muvā)yirattu muṉṉūṟum
Ananticākattikkuḷḷu (?) Innācciyār pakkalil niṉṟum vāṅki Āti caṇṭeśvara tevar śrīhastattu Oṭukkiṉamaikkuk kiḻppuṉaiyāka niṉṟu kiḻppuṉait tiṭṭuk kuṭuttom
nācciyāṟku koṉāṭāṉa kaṭalaṭaiyātu Ilaṅkaikoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu nāṭṭomum Uṭaiyār tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvara tevarkaṉmi koyiṟka
ṇakkarom Ippaṭikku Ivai Iṭaṅkoṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Aṇṇalvāyil vaḷavaṉ pallavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku nāraiyūr ceṅkatiṟ coḻamuventa veḷāṉ E
ḻuttu Ippaṭikku tirunāraiyūrp piramāṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku nampu ceyvāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku centaṉ kariyaperumāḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku vaṭukaṉ centaṉ Eḻuttu Ippa
ṭikku Irācentira veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku coḻativākara muventa veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai karuṇālaiyapperumāḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku tevarkaṉmi Āḷavanta piḷḷai Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭikku koyiṟkaṇakku ceruntavaṉapperumāḷ Eḻuttu Ivai nala[ nta] ṟiyum perumāḷ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.353 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
